name: GODAI RANSATSU: NIDAN JUTSU (ELEMENTAL DESTRUCTION: RANK TWO TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (*)

Rank: 12 (Spell Level 6)

Chakra Cost: 11

Learn DC: 26 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 29

Components: H, E, Mas *

This technique works like Godai Taigeki: Shodan Jutsu, except you launch a series of powerful missiles against up to 5 separate creatures or objects within the area, dealing 8d6 damage. This technique has the following variants, each of which requires you have learned at least 4 techniques of its subtype.

- Doryuuga Sougakari (Doton) [Earth]: Material Focus - At least 50 lbs of earth, stone or mud nearby.
- Fuurensetsu no Jutsu (Fuuton) [Wind]
- Karyuuga no Jutsu (Katon) [Fire]
- Raitsume no Jutsu (Raiton) [Electric]
- Shinhyoukodan no Jutsu (Hyouton) [Cold]: Material Focus - At least 50 cubic ft of snow or ice nearby.
- Suiryuuga Sougakari (Suiton) [Water]: Material Focus - At least 50 liters of water nearby.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d6, up to 1d6 per level or 20d6 (whichever is lower).

Mastery: Each step increases the number of possible targets by 1. The first, third and fifth step increase the radius by 5 ft each.
